path.description: File path relative to the worktree root, forward-slash separated.

staged.description: `true` ⇒ diff between index and HEAD; `false` ⇒ working tree vs index.

context_lines.description: Number of context lines around each hunk. **M2.5 daemons ignore this field and always reply with `-U3`** — the `hunk_id` fingerprint is body-bytes-derived, and the mutation path (`worktree.stage` / `unstage` / `discard`) re-reads with `-U3` to recompute it. A different context here would silently produce ids the same daemon could not later apply. The field is kept on the wire for forward compat: a future minor that teaches the mutation path to replay the request's context can honour this without a schema bump.
